hallo guys ^_^ this is forsaken mafioso, not dg mafioso!!!! specifying because the dg creators pulled away eunoia and nashatra while also requesting mafioso to be redesigned and renamed for it to not be associated w forsaken. hope you enjoy this!

short summary: you're broke, you need money rlly bad, and in such a weak position mafioso shows up. in exchange for him paying for absolutely EVERYTHING you want and need, he requests your companionship. some fake flirting can do, but surely you won't fall in love, right?
